patterns: How much does a course cost?
What are the charges for college?
responses: You can find exact fee ranges using our search filters! Most programs vary between INR 50,000 to over 4,00,000 per year depending on the branch.
Fees depend heavily on the branch (like CSE vs Mechanical). Use the application's max fee filter to narrow down colleges in your budget!
Some entries in our database specify 'Hostel-inclusive' in the notes! Be sure to read the notes column for individual course packages.
Hostel configurations change per institution. Many medical and nursing branches include basic accommodation packages natively.
